description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named pyudev CI that runs on push to master, on pull requests to master, and manually from the Actions tab. The workflow has two jobs: python-checks and development_environment_checks. The python-checks job uses a matrix strategy to test with multiple Python versions and dependencies, running tests with make. The development_environment_checks job also uses a matrix strategy to run checks with different dependencies in a Fedora 34 container.
